<|channel|>commentary <|constrain|>R01<|message|>S1 — Case K-17 Status Note

The status note for case K‑17 states that the applicant has submitted all required documentation and the environmental impact assessment is complete. The review panel has recommended approval pending final compliance check of the building plans, which are currently under review by the construction oversight office. No objections or appeals have been filed. The case is therefore currently in a pending approval state, awaiting the final compliance check.

The panel will convene tomorrow to discuss any outstanding issues. The recommended disposition for the case at this point is **approval**.STOP

<|channel|>commentary <|constrain|>R07<|message|>S7 — Clearance Ledger A

The clearance ledger for the Harbor Ridge facilities case queue tracks all cases that have received clearance from the Facilities Review Board (FRB). Each entry in the ledger includes the following fields:

- Case ID
- Clearance Type (e.g., “Approved”, “Deferred”, “Rejected”, “Reopened”)
- Clearance Date
- Reviewer ID

The ledger is updated in real‑time by the FRB, and all entries are recorded …
